mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Estate of the late firm of Thomas G. Shelor and Emmazetta Shelor
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Estate of the late firm of Thomas G. Shelor and Emmazetta Shelor Thomas G. Shelor, Deceased Partner Emmazetta Shelor, Surviving Partner Recorded in Ledger Book 6, page 497, of the Floyd County Circuit Court
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
